infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera so you can watch yourself while practicing exercises
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone to record your exercise practice videos
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app saves your exercise practice videos to your photo album so you can show them to your therapist
